name: Teenie Scouts BigFive
overview: “BIG FIVE” is a stop motion TV series that follows the story of a group of rescue toys called the "Big Five”. The show takes place in a Kid’s Play Café, where kids come to play with toys during the day. However, when all the kids go home, and the café closes, the toys come to life and begin their daily lives. In each episode, we see one of the toys get in a sticky situation, and the Big Five is always there to save the day.
